text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ksssssh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, it started raining! And we just finished
shopping...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We should find someplace to get out of the
rain.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! There's this place I've been wanting
to visit for a while now. Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? The planetarium?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah, there's a special event going on now...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like we came right on time. Let's check
it out!

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
Emitting its mystical glow in the night sky, the
moon carries with it a wondrous, almost magical
power.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, is this about the moon?

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
One of those powers we call gravity. Responsible
for the tides of the ocean, it has a great effect on
our planet.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I knew the moon had to be super powerful!
Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're so awesome, Kitasan! That event was
awesome! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm glad you enjoyed it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I saw you buy some kind of moon rock on our
shopping trip.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I remembered you saying something about
the moon having special magical powers, so I
thought you'd find it interesting.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're so thoughtful! ♪ The rock I bought
is a moonstone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a special stone imbued with the moon's
strength. If what they said earlier is true, I bet the
stone possesses some super magical power! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Super magical power?! Wow, I can't wait to see
the spells you'll make with that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Right? As a thank you for taking me to this event,
I'll let you be the first to see.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks so much! I'll be counting down the
days!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After exiting the building...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see the moon!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You're kidding! Where is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's over there! It's a little out of sight with
the telephone pole in the way...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I can't find it at all! Where are you
pointing? Where?!
